explanationZhTw: 「diary」是「日記」的意思，指用來記錄每天發生的事、想法或感受的本子。
generatedExample: She writes in her diary every night before bed.

explanationZhTw: `side-street` 指「小巷、支路、側街」，不是主要道路。這是常見但稍有組合性的地點詞。
generatedExample: We found a quiet cafe on a side-street behind the station.

explanationZhTw: `doorway` 指「門口、門道、門框內的出入口位置」。這裡是描述她站在牆上的出入口旁。
generatedExample: He waited in the doorway until the rain stopped.

explanationZhTw: 這裡的 `paint` 不是一般的「油漆」，而是指臉上的化妝品或妝容。屬於語境中的特殊用法。
generatedExample: She wore too much paint for the party, but it matched the costume.

explanationZhTw: 這裡的 `appeal to me` 不是「上訴」的意思，而是指「吸引我、讓我覺得有魅力」。在這個語境中，它是在描述說話者被她的妝容吸引。
generatedExample: The old photograph appealed to me because it felt honest and quiet.

explanationZhTw: `whiteness` 是名詞，表示「白色、雪白的程度」。這裡是在強調妝容的白得像面具。
generatedExample: The whiteness of the wall made the room feel brighter.

explanationZhTw: `telescreens` 是作品中的特殊名詞，指具監視與播放功能的螢幕設備。它不是日常英語常見詞，屬於文本內部世界的專有概念。
generatedExample: The hallway felt tense because the telescreens were always watching.

explanationZhTw: 這裡是片語動詞，意思是「繼續下去」或「繼續做某事」。
generatedExample: I was exhausted, but I had to go on until the train arrived.

explanationZhTw: 這裡是比喻用法，指費力地把腦中反覆出現的影像排除掉，不是字面上的「擠出」。
generatedExample: She tried to squeeze out the memory of that bad day and focus on work.

explanationZhTw: 這裡不是常見的「停電」或「昏倒」意思，而是指把記憶或念頭壓下去，讓它暫時消失。
generatedExample: He played loud music to black out the noise from the next room.

explanationZhTw: 「神經系統」；這裡指人體控制反應與壓力的系統，強調內在緊張會直接影響身體反應。
generatedExample: Stress can affect your nervous system and make it hard to sleep.

explanationZhTw: 這裡表示「很可能會、容易會」；不是「有法律責任」的意思。
generatedExample: If you skip meals, you are liable to feel tired in the afternoon.

explanationZhTw: 「可見症狀」；指外表看得出來的身體徵兆。
generatedExample: A high fever can be a visible symptom of infection.

explanationZhTw: 「扭曲的、變形的」；這裡描寫臉部因抽搐而突然變形。
generatedExample: Her face contorted with pain when she tried to stand up.

explanationZhTw: 慣用語，意思是「完蛋了、沒救了」；常用來形容某人處境很糟。
generatedExample: If the engine fails now, we are done for.

explanationZhTw: 「防範、避免」；指事先採取措施來阻止某事發生。
generatedExample: Wearing sunscreen helps with guarding against sunburn.

explanationZhTw: 這裡表示「吸了一口氣／喘口氣」，不是字面上的「拉」；屬於固定搭配，帶有動作與停頓的語氣。
generatedExample: He drew his breath and stepped onto the stage.

explanationZhTw: 表示「繼續做某事」。這是很常見的片語動詞用法。
generatedExample: After a short break, she went on working.

explanationZhTw: 「doorway」指門口、門洞或門框所在的出入口。這裡是沿著門口通過去到後面的空間。
generatedExample: She stood in the doorway and watched the rain.

explanationZhTw: 「backyard」是房子後面的院子，也就是後院。這裡表示從屋內走到屋後的空地。
generatedExample: The children were playing in the backyard.

explanationZhTw: 「basement」是地下室。這裡表示廚房位在地下樓層。
generatedExample: We keep old boxes in the basement.

explanationZhTw: 「turned down」在這裡不是「拒絕」，而是指把燈光調低、調暗。這是片語動詞的用法。
generatedExample: Please turn down the lamp before you sleep.

explanationZhTw: 表示牙齒發酸、發麻；也可引申為讓人感到刺耳、煩躁。
generatedExample: The screech of the chair on the floor set my teeth on edge.

explanationZhTw: 表示「無論如何／不管怎樣」，用來把話題拉回主線或表達最低限度的確認。
generatedExample: I may be late, but at any rate I'll be there.

explanationZhTw: 這裡不是化學上的意思，而是指「由...構成／組成」。
generatedExample: Her fear was compounded of doubt and exhaustion.

explanationZhTw: 表示「誘人、吸引人的」，帶有誘惑或神祕感。
generatedExample: The remote island had an alluring beauty.

explanationZhTw: 《一九八四》中的用語，指無產階級或平民大眾，帶有小說特定的政治語境。
generatedExample: The novel often contrasts the Party with the proles.

explanationZhTw: 這裡表示「和...糾纏在一起／聯想到一起」，不是單純的「混亂」。
generatedExample: Her childhood memories are mixed up with the smell of rain.

explanationZhTw: 指性行為，語氣正式且帶有道德色彩；這裡用來表達強烈的性聯想。
generatedExample: The article discussed how the novel treated fornication as a taboo.

explanationZhTw: 這裡的 `lapse` 不是「時間上的間隔」，而是「一次失誤、一次破戒」。整句是在說他兩年多來第一次違反規矩。
generatedExample: After months of saving money, her only lapse in judgment was buying the expensive coat.

explanationZhTw: `consort with` 是較正式的說法，意思是「與某人來往、交往」。在這裡帶有負面語氣，指和妓女交往。
generatedExample: He was warned against consorting with the wrong crowd after school.

explanationZhTw: `nerve yourself to do something` 是「鼓起勇氣去做某事」。這裡表示雖然違規很危險，但有時還是會逼自己去做。
generatedExample: I had to nerve myself to call and ask for a refund.

explanationZhTw: `life-and-death matter` 是慣用語，指「生死攸關的大事」。這裡表示雖然有風險，但還不到非常嚴重的程度。
generatedExample: Missing one deadline is bad, but it is not a life-and-death matter.

explanationZhTw: `forced-labour camp` 是「勞改營、強迫勞動營」；是一種嚴厲的懲罰場所。
generatedExample: Political prisoners were sent to a forced-labour camp for years.

explanationZhTw: `caught in the act` 是慣用語，表示「當場被抓到、被逮到正在做壞事」。
generatedExample: The thief was caught in the act by the store manager.

explanationZhTw: `swarm with` 原本指「蜂擁而至」，這裡形容某地「擠滿了、到處都是」。
generatedExample: The beach swarmed with tourists on the holiday weekend.

explanationZhTw: 這裡不是字面上的「賣掉自己」，而是指「賣淫、出賣身體」。
generatedExample: The novel shows how poverty can force people to sell themselves.

explanationZhTw: `tacitly` 表示「默許地、心照不宣地、沒有明說但其實接受」。
generatedExample: The rule was tacitly ignored by everyone in the office.

explanationZhTw: `outlet` 在這裡不是「出口」，而是「發洩管道、抒發途徑」。
generatedExample: Painting became an outlet for her anger and stress.

explanationZhTw: `suppressed` 在這裡是「壓抑、抑制」，指把慾望或情感壓住不讓它表現出來。
generatedExample: He tried to suppress his laughter during the meeting.

explanationZhTw: `furtive` 表示「鬼鬼祟祟的、偷偷摸摸的」，帶有見不得光的意思。
generatedExample: They exchanged furtive glances before the teacher walked in.

explanationZhTw: `submerged` 在這裡不是字面上的「被淹沒」，而是指「被壓在社會底層、被邊緣化的」。`despised` 則是「被鄙視的」。
generatedExample: They came from a submerged and despised class that had little political power.

explanationZhTw: `promiscuity` 指「濫交、性行為不檢點」，通常帶有強烈負面含義。
generatedExample: The article criticized the media for treating promiscuity as entertainment.

explanationZhTw: `purges` 在政治語境中是「清洗、肅清」，通常指大規模逮捕或排除被認為有敵意的人。
generatedExample: Many officials were removed during the political purges.

explanationZhTw: `confess to` 表示「承認、坦白（某事）」。這裡指被告往往被迫承認自己犯了這種罪。
generatedExample: She confessed to breaking the vase after dinner.

explanationZhTw: 「忠誠／歸屬感」；這裡指人對某個人、團體或理念的忠心與依附，政黨想避免人民有自己無法控制的忠誠對象。
generatedExample: The company wanted absolute loyalties from its staff.

explanationZhTw: 「情色感／性慾色彩」；不是單純的愛，而是帶有性吸引、挑逗意味的感受或表現。
generatedExample: The film uses lighting and music to suggest eroticism without showing anything explicit.

explanationZhTw: 「生育；產生」；較正式或古風的用法，指生出孩子，或使某事物產生。
generatedExample: They hoped to beget a child after many years of waiting.

explanationZhTw: 「性交」；正式說法，指性行為。
generatedExample: The doctor explained that sexual intercourse should never be painful.

explanationZhTw: 「灌腸」；一種醫療處置，把液體注入直腸以清空腸道。
generatedExample: The nurse prepared an enema before the procedure.

explanationZhTw: 「反覆灌輸；硬塞進腦中」；常指某種觀念被不停地強加給人，讓人想忘也忘不了。
generatedExample: The rule was rubbed into us until we could repeat it by heart.

explanationZhTw: 「主張；提倡」；公開支持某個想法、政策或做法。
generatedExample: Several doctors advocated regular exercise for older adults.

explanationZhTw: 「獨身；禁慾」；特別指刻意避免性關係，有時也包含不結婚。
generatedExample: He chose celibacy for personal and religious reasons.

explanationZhTw: 「人工授精」；用醫療方式讓受孕，不透過自然性交。
generatedExample: The couple decided to try artificial insemination after years of infertility.

explanationZhTw: 「意識形態；思想體系」；指一套支配政治或社會行動的核心信念。
generatedExample: The speech reflects the ideology of the ruling party.

explanationZhTw: 「扭曲；使變形／變質」；把原本正常的東西改壞，讓它失去原本的樣子或意義。
generatedExample: Fear can distort how people remember an event.

explanationZhTw: 這裡不是單純的「弄髒」；而是指把某件事弄得骯髒、低俗、道德上被玷污，帶有強烈的負面評價。
generatedExample: They tried to dirty it by attaching fake rumors to the project.

explanationZhTw: parted 在這裡指「分開、離異」，不是單純「分成兩部分」。用來說夫妻或情侶結束關係。
generatedExample: They parted after graduating from college.

explanationZhTw: seldom 是「很少、罕見地」的意思，語氣比 rarely/ not often 稍正式。
generatedExample: I seldom eat fast food during the week.

explanationZhTw: capable of 表示「有能力做某事」；這裡強調他竟然能夠把自己曾結婚這件事忘掉。
generatedExample: She is capable of finishing the report in one day.

explanationZhTw: permit 是「允許、准許」；在這裡指政權以法律/政策禁止離婚。
generatedExample: My parents do not permit me to stay out late.

explanationZhTw: encouraged 在這裡不是一般的「鼓勵」，而是指制度上偏向、甚至默許某種行為發生。
generatedExample: The teacher encouraged students to ask questions.

explanationZhTw: separation 在這裡指「分居、分開居住」，是婚姻關係中的法律或實際分開。
generatedExample: After the argument, they agreed on a temporary separation.

explanationZhTw: 「aquiline」指像鷹嘴一樣高而彎的，常用來形容鼻子或臉部輪廓，這裡是在描寫她的臉型。
generatedExample: He had an aquiline nose that made his profile easy to recognize.

explanationZhTw: 這個片語表示「幾乎完全」或「幾近於」，用來強調程度非常接近某種狀態。
generatedExample: The room was as nearly as possible silent during the test.

explanationZhTw: 這裡的「intimately」不是只指「親密地」，而是指「非常深入地、很熟悉地」認識某人。
generatedExample: She knew the system more intimately than anyone else on the team.

explanationZhTw: 這個固定片語表示「毫無例外、全部都如此」，用來強調沒有任何例外情況。
generatedExample: All the tickets, without exception, were sold out by noon.

explanationZhTw: 「vulgar」在這裡是「粗俗的、低俗的」意思，描述她的思想和品味很庸俗。
generatedExample: He made a vulgar joke that made everyone uncomfortable.

explanationZhTw: 這裡的「encountered」是「遇到、碰見」的意思，比較正式；也可指「經歷到」。
generatedExample: I encountered a problem while installing the software.

explanationZhTw: 「slogan」是「標語、口號」，這裡表示她腦中只有政治口號，沒有自己的想法。
generatedExample: The company changed its slogan to sound more modern.

explanationZhTw: 「imbecility」指「極端愚蠢、蠢話」，是比較文學或正式的說法。
generatedExample: The article was full of imbecility and careless claims.

explanationZhTw: 這裡的片語動詞「handed it out」表示「發放、散布」；在文中指黨把說法或教條塞給她。
generatedExample: The teacher handed out the worksheets before class started.

explanationZhTw: 這是帶有貶意的比喻，意思不是字面上的「人類音軌」，而是把她看成只會重複外來口號的人。
generatedExample: He joked that the chatty coworker was the office human sound-track.

explanationZhTw: 這裡的「endured」是「忍受、勉強承受」的意思，語氣比一般的「tolerate」更強。
generatedExample: She endured the long wait without complaining.

explanationZhTw: wince 表示因疼痛、不適或尷尬而微微縮一下、皺一下臉；這裡強調她身體的抗拒反應。
generatedExample: She winced when the doctor pressed on the bruise.

explanationZhTw: rigidity 指僵硬、缺乏柔軟度；這裡用來形容肌肉緊繃，傳達出她的不自然與抗拒。
generatedExample: The rigidity in his shoulders showed how tense he was.

explanationZhTw: 這裡的 submitting 不是一般「提交」，而是指被動接受、順從地任由事情發生，語氣帶有壓抑與無奈。
generatedExample: He stayed silent, submitting to the decision without protest.

explanationZhTw: celibate 指禁慾的、沒有性行為的，常用於宗教或個人選擇的語境。
generatedExample: The monk lived a celibate life in the monastery.

explanationZhTw: 這裡的 performance 不是「表演」，而是委婉地指一種令人不舒服、機械化重複的性行為或例行過程。
generatedExample: He spoke of the meeting as a performance, though everyone knew it was just a formality.

explanationZhTw: came round 是片語動詞，表示某個日子、時刻再次到來。
generatedExample: My turn came round much sooner than I expected.

explanationZhTw: give up 是片語動詞，表示放棄、停止嘗試。
generatedExample: After three failed attempts, he finally gave up.

explanationZhTw: parted 在這裡不是單純「分開」，而是指兩人關係結束、分離。
generatedExample: After the argument, the couple parted and never reunited.

explanationZhTw: 「inaudibly」表示「無法被聽見地、悄無聲息地」。這裡是在描述他嘆氣的聲音非常小，幾乎聽不見。
generatedExample: She shook her head and laughed inaudibly during the meeting.

explanationZhTw: 「picked up」在這裡是片語動詞，意思是「拿起、拾起」。這裡指他重新把筆拿在手上。
generatedExample: I picked up my keys from the table before leaving.

explanationZhTw: 「wrote」是「write」的過去式，意思是「寫下、書寫」。在這裡表示他開始寫字。
generatedExample: Yesterday she wrote a short letter to her friend.

explanationZhTw: 指「整個人重重地倒向／摔到」床上，帶有突然、粗魯的動作感，不是單純的「丟」。
generatedExample: She threw herself down on the sofa after the long shift.

explanationZhTw: 這裡是「立刻、馬上」的意思，表示動作沒有任何延遲。
generatedExample: He opened the letter at once.

explanationZhTw: 這裡的 preliminary 不是「初步的」形容詞，而是指「前置動作、鋪陳、準備」；整句是在說「完全沒有任何前戲／鋪墊」。
generatedExample: The meeting started without any kind of preliminary.

explanationZhTw: 這裡不是「粗糙的」，而是指言行或舉止很粗俗、下流、令人不舒服。
generatedExample: He made a coarse joke that embarrassed everyone.

explanationZhTw: 指把衣物往上拉起。
generatedExample: She pulled up her sleeves before washing the dishes.

explanationZhTw: 「mixed up with」在這裡是「和……混在一起、夾雜著」的意思，不是字面上的「弄亂」。
generatedExample: Her anger was mixed up with disappointment after the meeting.

explanationZhTw: 「ingrained」表示「根深蒂固的、深植於心的」，常用來形容習慣、觀念或信念很難改變。
generatedExample: Respect for elders was ingrained in him from childhood.

explanationZhTw: 「dinned into them」表示「反覆灌輸進他們腦中」，帶有強迫、洗腦的語氣。
generatedExample: The slogan was dinned into students until they could repeat it by heart.

explanationZhTw: 這裡的「impregnable」不是字面的「攻不破的城堡」，而是比喻成「無法被攻破、無法被影響或突破」的狀態。
generatedExample: Her calm expression made her seem impregnable during the argument.

explanationZhTw: 這裡是比喻說法，意思是「突破那道道德或貞潔的防線」，重點在於打破對方的自我約束。
generatedExample: He kept trying to break down her wall of silence.

explanationZhTw: 這裡的「seduction」不只是一般的「引誘」，而是帶有強烈性意味的「勾引、誘惑發生性關係」。
generatedExample: He described the scene as an attempt at seduction.

explanationZhTw: `had got to` 在這裡不是「已經得到」，而是表示「不得不、必須」，相當於較口語的 `had to`。
generatedExample: She had got to leave early to catch the last train.

explanationZhTw: `write down` 表示「寫下、記錄」；這裡用被動式 `be written down`，意思是這段內容必須被記錄下來。
generatedExample: Please write down the main points before the meeting ends.

explanationZhTw: `turn up` 這裡表示「調高、開大」；搭配 `lamp` 時，就是把燈光調亮。
generatedExample: She turned up the lamp so she could read more easily.

explanationZhTw: 微弱的光；feeble 在這裡不是「虛弱的人」，而是形容光線很弱、很暗。
generatedExample: A feeble light came from the hallway.

explanationZhTw: 煤油燈；這裡指用煤油照明的燈具，帶有舊式、昏黃的氛圍。
generatedExample: The old cabin was lit by a paraffin lamp.

explanationZhTw: 停住、停止移動；這裡表示他本來往前走了一步，卻立刻停下來。
generatedExample: She halted at the top of the stairs.

explanationZhTw: 強烈的性慾；在這裡是很直接、很本能的欲望，語氣偏強烈。
generatedExample: The novel explores desire, fear, and lust.

explanationZhTw: 非常清楚地意識到，而且帶著不安或痛苦感；不是普通的「知道」，而是很強烈地察覺到。
generatedExample: I was painfully conscious of everyone watching me.

explanationZhTw: 巡邏隊、巡邏人員；在這裡指會四處搜索或巡查的人。
generatedExample: The patrols checked the area every hour.

explanationZhTw: 更何況；甚至可以說。這裡用來加強前一句的可能性。
generatedExample: I don't trust him, and for that matter I don't trust his friends.

explanationZhTw: 這裡的 `got to` 是口語用法，表示「必須、得要」，不是「到達」；整句是在說這件事一定得被寫下來。
generatedExample: I got to finish this report before lunch.

explanationZhTw: `lamplight` 指「燈光、燈下的光線」，語氣比一般的 `light` 更有文學感。
generatedExample: We read the map by the lamplight.

explanationZhTw: 這裡的 `plastered` 不是「貼上去」的字面意思，而是指「厚厚地塗滿、糊滿」；描述化妝品塗得非常厚。
generatedExample: Mud was plastered so thick on his boots that you could not see the color.

explanationZhTw: `fall open` 表示東西自己張開；這裡是說嘴微微張開了。
generatedExample: The box fell open when I picked it up.

explanationZhTw: `cavernous` 原意是「像洞穴一樣的、空洞深大的」；這裡用來強調那片黑暗很深、很空，帶有強烈的畫面感。
generatedExample: The old warehouse had a cavernous echo that made every step sound huge.

explanationZhTw: `hurriedly` 指「匆忙地、急急忙忙地」，表示做事速度快、沒有從容。這裡用來描述他寫字時很趕。
generatedExample: She hurriedly packed her bag before the bus left.

explanationZhTw: `scrabbling handwriting` 在這裡不是字面上的「抓扒」字跡，而是形容「潦草、亂而快的字跡」，帶出寫得很急、很不工整的感覺。
generatedExample: His scrabbling handwriting was hard to read.

explanationZhTw: 「went ahead」在這裡表示「仍然照做、還是繼續進行」，帶有不顧顧慮或猶豫而採取行動的意思。
generatedExample: I was nervous, but I went ahead and asked for a refund.

explanationZhTw: 「just the same」這裡表示「還是、照樣」，用來強調前面提到的顧慮並沒有阻止說話者行動。
generatedExample: It was raining, but we went for a walk just the same.

explanationZhTw: 「at last」表示「終於、最後總算」，用來強調等待或拖延後才發生。
generatedExample: At last, she found her keys after searching the whole house.

explanationZhTw: 「made no difference」表示「沒有影響、沒有用」，意思是結果一樣沒有改變。
generatedExample: I explained it twice, but it made no difference.

explanationZhTw: 「therapy」是「治療、療法」，可指醫療或心理上的治療方式。
generatedExample: She started therapy to help with her anxiety.

explanationZhTw: 「urge」是「強烈的衝動、欲望」，指一種很難壓下去的想法或感覺。
generatedExample: He felt an urge to call his friend immediately.

explanationZhTw: 「at the top of his voice」表示「用最大的音量、用盡全力地喊」。
generatedExample: She called his name at the top of her voice.

explanationZhTw: 「as strong as ever」表示「一如既往地強烈」，強調這個感覺沒有變弱。
generatedExample: His determination was as strong as ever after the setback.
